summary: Tested Cast Rejection System (Sistema di rifiuto ingaggio cast) for CineWorld Studio's. Backend APIs and Frontend modal verified. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: POST /api/cast/offer - Returns accepted=true or accepted=false with reason
POST /api/cast/offer - Returns stars and fame score when rejected
POST /api/cast/offer - Returns 422 for missing person_id or person_type
POST /api/cast/offer - Works with optional film_genre parameter
POST /api/cast/offer - Returns already_refused=true for same person in 24h
GET /api/cast/rejections - Returns list of rejections in last 24 hours
GET /api/cast/rejections - Returns refused_ids array for easy UI checking
Rejection reasons are in Italian when user.language='it'
Rejection works for actors, directors, screenwriters, composers
Frontend rejection modal appears with: title, name, reason, stars, fame
Frontend card shows 'Ha rifiutato' (Refused) badge after rejection
Frontend modal close button text is 'Ho capito' in Italian

backend_cast_offer_endpoint.details: POST /api/cast/offer correctly accepts person_id, person_type, film_genre. Returns accepted=true/false with reason for rejection. Includes stars and fame score.

backend_rejections_endpoint.details: GET /api/cast/rejections returns list of rejections in last 24 hours with refused_ids array.

rejection_modal_frontend.details: Modal appears with: 'OFFERTA RIFIUTATA' title, cast member name (Sabine Wolf), Italian rejection reason, star rating (3 stars), fame score (81), 'Ho capito' close button.

card_disabled_badge.details: Card shows red 'Ha rifiutato' (Refused) badge after rejection and is visually disabled.

italian_language.details: All rejection reasons returned in Italian for users with language='it'. Example: 'Sto lavorando a un progetto personale che richiede tutta la mia attenzione.'

rejection_persistence.details: Rejected person cannot be asked again for 24 hours. Second offer returns already_refused=true.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (rejection modal, refused badge, Italian text all verified)

seed_data_creation: Created rejection_test_low_level@test.com user with Italian language for testing rejection modal.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cast rejection system fully working. POST /api/cast/offer triggers rejection based on: star rating vs player level, fame score, player revenue, genre skill match, and random factor. Rejection persists for 24 hours in MongoDB 'rejections' collection. Frontend modal shows rejection reason in user's language (IT/EN). Card shows 'Ha rifiutato' badge and becomes non-clickable.
screenshots: .screenshots/modal_visible.png - Rejection modal showing 'Offerta Rifiutata' with reason in Italian
.screenshots/step4_italian.png - Writer selection step with Italian UI
